user.title: ENTSO-E Energy Prices
user.description: Configure the ENTSO-E Transparency Platform integration. An API key is required — get yours at https://transparency.entsoe.eu/

data_description.api_token: Your ENTSO-E Transparency Platform API token
data_description.area: Select your bidding zone — for Poland select '🇵🇱 Polska'
data_description.auto_rate: Automatically fetch EUR/PLN rate from the National Bank of Poland API
data_description.currency_rate: Manual EUR/PLN rate — used when auto rate is disabled
data_description.seller_margin: Your energy seller's margin per kWh (e.g. 0.05 PLN/kWh)
data_description.rce_entity: RCE PSE sensor entity ID (e.g. sensor.rce_pse_cena). Leave empty to disable spread.

error.connection_failed: Could not connect to ENTSO-E. Check your API token and bidding zone.
error.invalid_rate: Invalid exchange rate — must be greater than 0

abort.already_configured: This bidding zone is already configured
